feature.label: BPMN2 Metamodel
feature.description: BPMN2 is a component of the Model Development Tools (MDT) subproject that provides a metamodel implementation based on the Business Process Model and Notation (BPMN) 2.0 OMG specification.
feature.copyright: Copyright (c) 2011, 2020 Red Hat, Inc. All rights reserved. This program and the accompanying materials are made available under the terms of the Eclipse Public License 2.0 which accompanies this distribution, and is available at https://www.eclipse.org/legal/epl-2.0/ SPDX-License-Identifier: EPL-2.0 Contributors: Red Hat, Inc. - initial API and implementation
